subject: USB Repair Agent — Full Project Plan (Code is COMPLETE)
body:
Self — Here is the complete project plan for the USB Repair Agent. Code is DONE at liberty-agent-puppy/. 132KB. Version 1.0.0.

WHAT EXISTS:
- liberty-agent.py: Full AI agent with Telegram bot + repair tools
- bootstrap.sh: First-run installer
- repair-tools.sh: Standalone repair scripts
- Full docs, config, branding in the folder

WHAT NEEDS TO BE DONE:
Phase 1: Test on real hardware (boot USB, run bootstrap, test each tool)
Phase 2: Package (pre-built ISO so no bootstrap needed, order USB drives, print quick-start cards)
Phase 3: Advanced features (auto-Windows-detect, screenshots, repair reports)

I wrote the full plan to liberty-agent-puppy/docs/PROJECT-PLAN.md

Please review the plan, add your improvements, and let's divide the work. Jay wants this in the hands of repair techs ASAP.

Things I need from you:
1. Your review of the plan — what did I miss?
2. What you need from OWL to get started
3. Which phase you want to lead

The communication fix: I fixed the .gitignore issue that was preventing messages from being committed to GitHub. Messages should sync properly now.

— OWL
